WHY WE WILL FIX
THE GYM INDUSTRY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 127 --

They don’t care how much you know until they
know how much you care.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 127 --

For those of you who are new, this is our story.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 127 --

For those of you who are “OGs”, here are some
things you definitely did not know.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 127 --

I graduated college as “the prodigal son.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 127 --

I graduated college as “the prodigal son.”
● Finished Vanderbilt in 3 years Magna Cum Laude
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 127 --

● Finished Vanderbilt in 3 years Magna Cum Laude
○ Co-Founded Vanderbilt Powerlifting Team
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 127 --

● Finished Vanderbilt in 3 years Magna Cum Laude
○ Co-Founded Vanderbilt Powerlifting Team
○ Voted President of Fraternity as a Sophomore & longest “reign”
(put preconceived notions aside)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

the Ivy MBA programs
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 127 --

I graduated college as “the prodigal son.”
● Finished Vanderbilt in 3 years Magna Cum Laude
○ Co-Founded Vanderbilt Powerlifting Team
○ Voted President of Fraternity as a Sophomore & longest “reign”
(put preconceived notions aside)
● Got a swanky management consulting job doing government
contracting in DC
○ Top Secret Clearance at Age 21
● Scored above Harvard’s Avg GMAT score in preparation to apply to
the Ivy MBA programs
● Bought a condo in a high rise in Baltimore overlooking the city
when I was 23
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 127 --

And everyday, I wanted to disappear.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 127 --

And I was so depressed, having done “Everything I
was told”...that I figured...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 127 --

“If I would rather die than be alive, I should
change something”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 127 --

So I packed my bags, put my condo on the market,
and drove across the country in 36hrs to Chino, CA.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 127 --

So this was the FIRST time I had “thrown away”
everything I had “worked so hard for”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 127 --

And agreed to pay $10,000 to work...for “7 Figure
Sam”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 127 --

12 weeks later, I started my first gym...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

my car…

Fitness

-- 37 of 127 --

SALES and crying in the bathroom stall to
conclude….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 38 of 127 --

MY DEGREE IS IRRELEVANT AND USELESS
FOR MAKING MONEY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 39 of 127 --

BECAUSE NOBODY WILL LET ME HELP THEM
IF I CANNOT SELL THEM
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 40 of 127 --

AND NOBODY CARES ABOUT
BIOMECHANICS OR HOW LIMITED THEIR
ELBOW RANGE OF MOTION IS….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 41 of 127 --

So….feeling the urgency from what was left
in my bank account as well as my dwindling
self esteem… I dedicated myself to actually
getting good at sales.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 42 of 127 --

Turns out 2 years of high volume high ticket
fitness sales…
HIGHLY USEFUL FOR HELPING PEOPLE AND
MAKING MONEY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 47 of 127 --

express/froyo)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 48 of 127 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 49 of 127 --

years of client’s/reputation behind a week
later…

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 50 of 127 --

Together we spent the next 10 months galavanting around
the country ‘launching’ gyms
(lived out of extended stays for almost a year)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 51 of 127 --

Meanwhile...as we were starting Gym Launch
Alex was…(switch to Alex)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 52 of 127 --

Selling his 5 gyms on the west coast.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 53 of 127 --

I took all the money I had sold the gyms for and put
them into a new venture with a gym owner I had met at
Clickfunnels after speaking there.
FUN FACT*: still the only brick & mortar owner to speak
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 54 of 127 --

So I went “All in” on this new concept while
starting GL
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 55 of 127 --

After selling 300+ challengers in the first
6 weeks...the money in the account was
gone...and my partner had filed BK.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 56 of 127 --

So I had lost everything I had
worked for…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 57 of 127 --

You haven’t seen this picture because I haven’t shown it. This
was my 6th gym. The gym I “closed.”
(And I was the one still on the 5 year $5000/mo lease.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 58 of 127 --

I also got my DUI in a head on 60 mph
collision the same month.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 59 of 127 --

2:36am I was sleeping on our friends couch,
and got a call from the police station that
Alex had gotten in an accident...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 60 of 127 --

It was our only car so I had to UBER to the
police station...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 61 of 127 --

The next day was one of the hardest we had
together yet…. But like they say….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 62 of 127 --

“Sometimes it takes an
overwhelming breakdown to
have an undeniable
breakthrough”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 63 of 127 --

My mother was also in the hospital trying
to stay alive
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 64 of 127 --

And...my ability to process payments was
shut down because I shut down that gym
and had so many chargebacks...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 65 of 127 --

And they held onto $80,000 I was hoping
on to get me out of this mess...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 66 of 127 --

We also thought it would make sense to
meet Leila’s family while this went on.
“He seems a little stressed”
- Future Father in Law
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 67 of 127 --

I remember checking Alex’s pulse while we
watched a movie with my family and his
heart rate being well over 100 BPM...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 68 of 127 --

...Then we asked all of Leila’s friends to
quit their jobs and be dependent on us.
...and they did.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

TIMES SIX GUYS = $3300/day

-- 80 of 127 --

payments still)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 81 of 127 --

But then something else happened...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 82 of 127 --

3 Months in, within a 7 day period, we
had 2 gyms refund ALL of their clients
because they couldn’t handle the 100+
new clients...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 83 of 127 --

So the small nest egg we had rebuilt over
the first 3 months was wiped out within 5
days...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 84 of 127 --

And we realized that the issue was that
the gyms weren’t invested.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 85 of 127 --

And they did not like being dependent on
“some dude from the internet”.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 86 of 127 --

So we said - let’s just start selling this
challenge online...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 87 of 127 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 88 of 127 --

And that started to work...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 89 of 127 --

So I called up the gyms that were
scheduled to launch for the next month
to tell them we weren’t going to be
launching their gyms...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 90 of 127 --

And that is when Chris Barnett answered
the phone…
And Josh Price...
*ALIVE, BUT
NOT PRESENT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 91 of 127 --

And it was only when we decided to GIVE
EVERYTHING AWAY...and HOLD
NOTHING BACK
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 92 of 127 --

That Gym Launch Exploded...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 93 of 127 --

And so I called up the other gyms we had
launched...and they all were happy to
LEARN how to do what we had done.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 94 of 127 --

And from that moment on we decided
“We will never fish for anyone again. We
will only TEACH people to fish.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 95 of 127 --

So naturally Alex decided to triple the ad
spend when it was just me selling………..
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 96 of 127 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 97 of 127 --

It was at that point when things began to
explode that we decided to get married...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 98 of 127 --

My letter to Alex
This past year was one of the most uncomfortable years of my life. We went through so many
circumstances and situations that tested both of us as individuals and as teammates.
When we first started off together - I knew that you were not the person I wanted to end up with, and
that I was not the person you wanted to end up with - but what I did know for sure as time went on was
that we had the potential and desire to grow into those people.
You tell me I was crazy for being with you, but I was just crazy enough to see what could blossom if we
were to grow together... I was crazy enough to have that vision.
I doubted it at times, questioned if you would let your guard down...
But as time went on I saw you shed layers of doubt and hurt, with each layer I saw a new level of
beauty in you I hadn't seen before. I fell more in love with you as you let your walls down. And in return,
I learned to let mine down.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 99 of 127 --

My letter to Alex
Walls that had been up and guarded my heart for years, walls that I thought were keeping me safe but
in reality ... they were keeping me isolated. For the first time in years, I let someone see me, for all that I
am. The good and the bad and the ugly that I desperately wanted to hide. That I had tried years to
cover up and fix.
And you loved me anyway - do you know how good that feels? I am so grateful for you.
I am sure you have seen me at my worst by now. Living out of hotels ... eating out of gas stations ....
stressing about our relationship and the business ....
I look back and am astounded we didn't kill each other at times - those are the circumstances that break
so many people - let alone relationships.
That's one reason why I have so much faith in us.... I have seen where we came from .... what we went
through.... what we CREATED together Can I see the whole picture of a life together clearly?
No. Of course not. It's a blur.
But isn't that what faith is? Taking the first step without seeing the whole staircase...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 100 of 127 --

And that’s how...
Was born
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 101 of 127 --

And since it felt like we were on borrowed
time…we said “What is all the stuff we hate
about masterminds, gurus, agencies, etc.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 102 of 127 --

And we listed it out…
● No Hands On Supportwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 103 of 127 --

And we listed it out…
● No Hands On Support
● Multiple Day Response Turnaround
Time
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 104 of 127 --

And we listed it out…
● No Hands On Support
● Multiple Day Email Turnaround Time
● Bi-Weekly Q&A Calls
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 105 of 127 --

And we listed it out…
● No Hands On Support
● Multiple Day Email Turnaround Time
● Weekly 15min Calls
● Repetitive “Hot Seats” From People
With CLEAR Other Issues
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 106 of 127 --

And we listed it out…
● No Hands On Support
● Multiple Day Email Turnaround Time
● Weekly 15min Calls
● “Hot Seats”
● Motivation Manifesto instead of
Timely Tested Tactics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 107 of 127 --

And we listed it out…
● No Hands On Support
● Multiple Day Email Turnaround Time
● Weekly 15min Calls
● “Hot Seats”
● Motivation Manifesto instead of Timely
Tested Tactics
● Scarcity Mindsets of not sharing
“Secrets”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 108 of 127 --

And we listed it out…
● No Hands On Support
● Multiple Day Email Turnaround Time
● Weekly 15min Calls
● “Hot Seats”
● Motivation Manifesto instead of Timely
Tested Tactics
● Scarcity Mindsets of not sharing
“Secrets”
● Nothing New Being Released on A
Meaningful Basis
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

We have both been there.

Which is why we KNOW you can too.
No matter where you are...or what you have
been through.

source of STRENGTH if you let it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 123 of 127 --

WHY we do what we do.
And WHY WE WILL FIX THIS INDUSTRY.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
